meta.title: HUGGO Pricing — Feature Tiers | 0% Commission
meta.description: Discover HUGGO tiers: Essentials, Smart, Marketing, Analytics. Zero commission on sales. Request a personalized quote within 24h.

hero.title: A tier for every business.
hero.subtitle: Pricing tailored to your activity and volume. Zero commission on your sales, whichever tier you choose.

tiers.title: Four tiers, one promise: zero commission.

included.title: No matter your tier, these fundamentals are included.
items: Zero commission on all your sales — flat monthly subscription
POS sync — HUGGO connects to your existing POS system
Multi-method payment — Apple Pay, Google Pay, Stripe, Contodeo
Updates included — your assistant evolves at no extra cost

roi.title: ROI is visible from month one.

items.title: +15 to +30% average basket.
items.description: Your customers order more when friction disappears. Product recommendations, customer memory, cart follow-up: HUGGO increases the average ticket naturally.

items.title: 0% commission vs 20-30% on platforms.
items.description: On €5,000 monthly revenue through a delivery platform, you give back €1,000 to €1,500 in commissions. With HUGGO: zero.

items.title: Live the same day.
items.description: No weeks of setup, no developer to pay. Your WhatsApp assistant goes live in minutes.

network.title: Managing a network of 50+ locations?
network.description: Dedicated pricing, volume-based. A dedicated account manager to build your tailored proposal.

items.question: Why aren't prices shown?
items.answer: Because pricing is adapted to your activity, volume, and vertical (retail, franchise, collectivity). We prefer offering you a fair quote rather than a generic price. Response within 24h.

items.question: Are there commissions on sales?
items.answer: No. No commission, no percentage taken from your sales. The subscription is monthly and flat.

items.question: Can I change tiers?
items.answer: Yes. You can upgrade at any time, with no service interruption.

items.question: What does it cost for a network?
items.answer: Network pricing is volume-based and decreases with the number of locations. Contact our sales team for a tailored quote.

final-cta.title: Get your quote within 24h.
final-cta.subtitle: Tell us about your business — we'll send a tailored quote, no strings attached.
